query:
SELECT u.id, u.name, u.role, e.id as equipe_id, e.nome as equipe_nome, e.gestorId
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN equipes e ON e.gestorId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Guilherme%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2jGgPCERyrvb2fZ.e6480e658f64 --database gjgL2sFxYNbZjhUM6i4tZH --execute SELECT u.id, u.name, u.role, e.id as equipe_id, e.nome as equipe_nome, e.gestorId
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN equipes e ON e.gestorId = u.id
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Guilherme%';
